news.paragraph: SLV is navigating a volatile macro environment characterized by rising Treasury yields and geopolitical uncertainty surrounding stalled peace efforts. While long-term demand from the clean energy and industrial sectors remains a positive driver, recent inflation concerns have pressured exchange-traded funds lower. Options traders should weigh these immediate macroeconomic headwinds against the broader trend of commodities reaching record levels.

headlines.title: Treasury Yields Jump Amid Fed Shift. Blame These Culprits As S&P 500 Falls.
